---
title: "Calendar"
toc: false
sidebar: false
page-layout: full
---

<style>
  /* Override grid layout for this page specifically */
  .page-columns .page-full {
    display: block !important;
    max-width: 900px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  /* Make iframe responsive and centered */
  iframe {
    max-width: 100%;
    display: block;
    margin: 1.5rem auto;
  }
</style>

Would you like to invite us to speak to your group or event? Would you like us to run a workshop? We can do in person or online* as we are able. Email Chris Orban at [chris.m.orban@gmail.com](mailto:chris.m.orban@gmail.com) to reach out.

*In online presentations we can do a green screen within zoom. It's pretty cool.

<iframe style="border: 0;" src="https://calendar.google.com/calendar/embed?src=stemcodingvideos%40gmail.com&amp;ctz=America%2FNew_York" width="800" height="600" frameborder="0" scrolling="no"></iframe>
